Flying RC Airplanes with the Cockpit chair! We upgraded the seat and rudder pedals so it’s a bit more scale. Still have a few more things to tweak and it’s ready for warbirds #technology #rchobby #fpv

Giving my RC Plane MORE POWER! Converting this FMS F4U Corsair from 6s to 8s. This was honestly the best mod for this plane and was extremely simple. By taking out the old 80 amp ESC and replacing it with a new 120 amp ESC allows us to run 8s on this big bird. Since I’ll be running two 4s 6000mah Lipo batteries, I added a dual EC5 connector and had to make a small notch in my canopy. Unbelievably, this actually helps CG out the plane better with the extra nose weight. If you haven’t watch my flight video, please do! #rcplane #corsair #radiocontrol #remotecontrol #rchobby

I 3D printed a flyable RC F-22! This is my favorite 3D printed jet so far. I used the Bambu Lab A1 and X1C. Another Ptikyle design! Twin 40mm EDFs power this little beast and it flies AMAZING! Even printed a few different canopy’s for this one. #rcjet #rcplane #f22 #f22raptor #bambulab #3dprinting #3dprintedmodels #radiocontrol #remotecontrol #rchobby
Epic Sukhoi Su-30 RC Turbine Jet with Incredible Thrust Vector Control

I got my first X-Fly Plane! The C-17 QUAD EDF! When I saw this has 4 EDF’s I knew I had to check it out. Assembly was insanely easy, just make sure your wings connect and plug in. I was really impressed with the finish, and coming with all the decals installed. Not a huge fan of it being a bottom loader, but I can look past that for how good this plane looks. #rcplane #rcplanes #cargoplane #c17 #c17globemaster #radiocontrol #remotecontrol #rc #rchobby

The scale details on this Little Bird RC Helicopter are amazing, just wish it wouldn’t have exploded on its maiden flight.. However, I heard back from Stirlingkit/Yu Xiang and they reviewed my crash video and were able to diagnose the cause. They’re taking the right steps to make sure everything that goes out is safe, and improving the design for the tail rotor wiring. Always be safe around RC Helicopters! #rchelicopter #radiocontrol #remotecontrol #rcheli #littlebird

The Flywing Bell 206 has some amazing features for an RC Helicopter. My personal favorite is probably the quick release blades, which make storage and transport a breeze. It’s also a GPS helicopter, meaning it has altitude hold and position hold so even someone who’s never flown could fly this. It’s smooth as butter with its all metal rotor head and has a phenomenal paint job. It comes completely ready to fly too with battery, charger, radio, etc. @flywing_rc makes some of my favorite helicopters. #rchelicopter #rcheli #bell206 #radiocontrol #remotecontrol

This XFly B-1B Lancer aka the BONE 🦴 from @bananahobbyonline is INSANE! This just may be my largest EDF RC jet to date. Not going to lie, I was intimidated by putting this one together, but it went together SO EASY! This really feels like a solid jet. I’m really impressed and ecstatic to do the maiden. But holy cow, this one takes up some space 😅 #rcjet #b1 #rcplane #radiocontrol #remotecontrol
